summary_one_line: ICC profile PCS field at offset 0x14 must equal the 4-char signature 'Lab ' rather than 'XYZ ' to take the true branch

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte PCS color-space signature in the ICC profile header (offset 0x14-0x17) must be the literal 'Lab ' (4c 61 62 20) so that cmsGetPCS(hProfile) == cmsSigLabData; any other PCS such as 'XYZ ' (58 59 5a 20) takes the false branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed carries 4c 61 62 20 ('Lab ') at offsets 0x14-0x16, exactly the constant the source compares cmsGetPCS(hProfile) against (cmsSigLabData).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Every loser-blocking seed carries 58 59 5a 20 ('XYZ ') at offsets 0x14-0x16, so cmsGetPCS returns a non-Lab PCS and the true branch is never taken.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc intercept the PCS-signature integer/string comparison, log the runtime operand cmsSigLabData, and I2SRandReplace splices that 4-byte literal into the input at the offset where the old PCS value appeared; naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and must blindly mutate the 4-byte field to the exact magic, which they fail to do in 24h.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is an equality test of the profile PCS against the Lab-data signature constant.
Winner-resolving seeds carry the ASCII 'Lab' bytes at offsets 0x14-0x16.
Loser-blocking seeds carry the ASCII 'XYZ' bytes at offsets 0x14-0x16 instead.
A concrete winner seed shows 'Lab ' at the PCS header field.
A concrete loser seed shows 'XYZ ' at the PCS header field.
cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which substitutes one logged CMP operand at offsets where the other operand appears in the input.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so the I2S delta is what value_profile_cmplog adds over value_profile.
Both decisive pairs differ by exactly the I2S technique.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2170 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 12a22fd23d13237c` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 4 of the 5-level ancestor chain; tool reported '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 4', characteristic of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in cmplog under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on a 4-byte equality where naive/value_profile resolve the gate at the same rate as cmplog/vpc within the budget, showing I2S substitution confers no advantage for this magic-constant comparison.

weakest_evidence_point: The I2S-floor signal is a single unnamed dash row (lower bound) rather than a literal logged I2SRandReplace name, so the chain only corroborates an I2S find without naming the exact mutation that produced the Lab bytes.
